raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to file a formal complaint regarding a credit account opened in my name with American Express. I did not authorize the creation of this account, nor have I ever applied for credit with American Express. This account has been fraudulently opened under my name, and it is negatively affecting my credit report. 

XXXX credit account was opened in my name without my knowledge or consent. 
* I have not applied for any credit with American Express and have not authorized anyone to do so on my behalf. 
* This fraudulent account has been reported to American Express and the credit reporting agencies, but it continues to appear on my credit report. 
* I request immediate removal of this fraudulent account from my credit report.
